name: an original yet authentic Indian flavor.

source.cookbook: The Complete and Authentic Thai Curry Cookbook 2
source.author: Various

method: Shape the meat mixture into walnut-sized meatballs.
Add onion to the butter and cook until the onion is tender.
Add curry powder and mix well.
Insert the meatballs and cook well for about ten minutes, shaking the pan
Mix the tomato puree, remaining butter, one tsp.. of salt, cayenne pepper,
and flour in another saucepan. Cook until the sauce has thickened.
If you actually like the sweet taste of pineapple, you’ll love the hint of it
that the addition of pineapple provides. Also, a great option to combine
